items.title: Language model harnesses are compositional generalizers
items.summary: Harnesses can lead to compositional generalization: we observe a property in training RLMs, in which similarly structured tasks are viewed as isomorphic and all individual LM calls in the harness become in-distribution.
items.titleZh: 语言模型的Harnesses具备组合泛化能力
items.summaryZh: Harnesses可以实现组合泛化：我们在训练RLM时观察到一种性质，即结构相似的任务被视为同构，harness中的所有单独语言模型调用都变为分布内。

items.title: Exploration Matters for Escaping the Blur Trap in 3D Gaussian Splatting
items.summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) employs Gaussian primitives for explicit scene representation, facilitating real-time, high-fidelity reconstruction and novel view synthesis of complex scenes. However, the explicit modeling inherent in 3DGS introduces a gradient bias during optimizat
items.titleZh: 探索对逃离3D高斯点模糊陷阱的重要性
items.summaryZh: 3D高斯点（3DGS）使用高斯基元进行显式场景表示，促进复杂场景的实时高保真重建和新视角合成。然而，3DGS的显式建模在优化过程中引入了梯度偏差。

items.title: RynnBrain 1.1: Towards More Capable and Generalizable Embodied Foundation Model
items.summary: We present RynnBrain 1.1, a family of embodied foundation models spanning 2B, 9B, and 122B-A10B scales. Trained with a unified spatio-temporal and physically grounded framework, RynnBrain 1.1 supports embodied perception, spatial reasoning, localization, and planning. Compared wi
items.titleZh: RynnBrain 1.1：迈向更强大且通用的具身基础模型
items.summaryZh: 我们推出了RynnBrain 1.1系列具身基础模型，涵盖2B、9B和122B-A10B规模。通过统一的时空和物理基础框架训练，支持具身感知、空间推理、定位和规划。相比于之前版本，性能更优。

items.title: LLM-as-a-Coach: Experiential Learning for Non-Verifiable Tasks
items.summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) on open-ended tasks compresses an LLM's rubric-based evaluation into a scalar reward, discarding rich textual feedback and conflating responses with distinct quality profiles. We propose Experiential Learning (EL), which repurposes the feedback model f
items.titleZh: LLM作为教练：非可验证任务的体验式学习
items.summaryZh: 强化学习（RL）在开放式任务中将基于规则的LLM评估压缩为标量奖励，丢失丰富文本反馈并混淆不同质量的响应。我们提出体验式学习（EL），重新利用反馈模型f。

items.title: Patch Policy: Efficient Embodied Control via Dense Visual Representations
items.summary: Pretrained dense visual features from Vision Transformers (ViTs) are powerful yet have been underutilized in robot learning. Modern robot policies either compress each observation into a single global token, or rely on visual backbones trained from scratch, sacrificing both fine-
items.titleZh: Patch Policy：通过密集视觉表示实现高效具身控制
items.summaryZh: 预训练的视觉Transformer（ViTs）密集视觉特征强大但在机器人学习中未被充分利用。现代机器人策略要么将观察压缩为单一全局token，要么依赖从零训练的视觉骨干，牺牲细节。

items.title: Understanding Reasoning from Pretraining to Post-Training
items.summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become central to improving large language models (LLMs) on complex reasoning tasks, yet RL post-training is largely studied in isolation from the pretraining that precedes it. As a result, two basic questions remain open: (1) how do pretraining ch
items.titleZh: 从预训练到后训练理解推理
items.summaryZh: 强化学习（RL）已成为提升大型语言模型（LLMs）复杂推理任务能力的核心，但RL后训练通常独立于之前的预训练研究。因此，两个基本问题仍未解决：（1）预训练如何影响后续训练。

items.title: FM-VLA: Force-based Memory for Vision-Language-Action Models in Contact-Rich Manipulation
items.summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have achieved impressive generalization in robotic manipulation, and recent memory-augmented VLAs have relaxed the Markovian assumption by conditioning on past images or language summaries. Vision-based memory approaches address this by conditi
items.titleZh: FM-VLA：基于力的记忆用于接触丰富操作的视觉-语言-动作模型
items.summaryZh: 视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在机器人操作中表现出色，最近的记忆增强VLA通过条件过去图像或语言摘要放宽了马尔可夫假设。基于视觉的记忆方法通过条件实现此目标。

items.title: TimeLens2: Generalist Video Temporal Grounding with Multimodal LLMs
items.summary: Video multimodal large language models (MLLMs) can describe what happens in a video, but rarely identify when the supporting evidence occurs. We study generalist video temporal grounding, in which one model predicts a variable-cardinality set of evidence intervals across video le
items.titleZh: TimeLens2：基于多模态大语言模型的通用视频时间定位
items.summaryZh: 视频多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）能描述视频内容，但很少能识别证据发生的时间。我们研究通用视频时间定位，单模型预测视频中可变数量的证据区间。

items.title: Loop the Loopies!
items.summary: We present the Loopie series, consisting of two Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models: a 20B-parameter model with 2B active parameters and a 6B-parameter model with 0.6B active parameters. Looped Transformers have long faced a challenge: given an N times increase in pre-training comput
items.titleZh: Loop the Loopies！
items.summaryZh: 我们推出Loopie系列，包括两个专家混合（MoE）模型：一个20B参数含2B激活参数，另一个6B参数含0.6B激活参数。循环Transformer长期面临预训练计算量增加的挑战。

items.title: SWE-Pruner Pro: The Coder LLM Already Knows What to Prune
items.summary: Pruning long context for coding agents has been a vital technology for efficient context management. While existing context pruning methods such as SWE-Pruner realize this by attaching a separate code classifier, we find the agent itself encodes internal representations indicatin
items.titleZh: SWE-Pruner Pro：编码型LLM已知何处应剪枝
items.summaryZh: 长上下文剪枝对编码代理的高效上下文管理至关重要。现有方法如SWE-Pruner通过附加代码分类器实现剪枝，但我们发现代理自身编码了指示剪枝的内部表示。

items.title: Cisco releases Antares-350M and Antares-1B, two open-weight AI models to find known vulnerabilities within a codebase, and plans to release Antares-3B soon (Sam Sabin/Axios)
